ab: Cumai, inika ken a paqenetj anga kemacu tua inpic, a maqati a su pasedjaman aken?
ch: W:Cumai，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Cumai, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: neka nu ku inpic, ni Keljeng cu a inpic.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Keljeng’s.

ab: sa’a maqati a su pasedjaman aken a palamu? ku pacikelav anga nusauni.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ui nanguaq, alapu.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: masalu, masalu ayau anga numaya ti Keljeng.
en: Thank you and thank Keljeng for me.

ab: anema su kinasaljinga?
en: May I help you?

ab: uri pacikel aken tuca drusa a laqulj.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ui, anema anan auta?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: uri kisedjam anan aken tua tjelu a laqulj.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: ui pai. nu makatjelulj paqenetju a pacikel.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: inika na su pacikel tua siquliqulip tjanuaken.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: ku pinacikel anga tatiav.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: nauwa, awa nekanga azua ku siquliqulip.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: aigu su sinipasedjam anga tjai Api.
en: Did you lend it to Api?

ab: inika ken a kemeljang. vaik aken a kivadaq tjaimadju.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: ku sipasedjaman anan a ku siquliqulip tjanusun.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Keljeng, a ti Kuljelje a napasedjam tjanusun tuca uba?
en: Keljeng, did Kuljelje lend you this coat?

ab: ini, vineli cu ni ’ina tjanuaken.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: pailja mamav ca nu uba kati Kuljelje.
en: Kuljelje’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: qecengecengel a uba nimadju, maretimalji a quljav na nia uba.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Paules, a nakisedjam sun tjai Cumai ta paisu?
en: Paules, did you borrow money from Cumai?

ab: izua, uri ku cugan timadju tucu a qadav, manu inika ken a paqenetj anga kemacu tua paisu.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: saka nungida su cugan timadju?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: nutiav tjara ku cugi timadju.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ui ku qivuavanga numaya ti Cumai.
en: Okay, I will tell Cumai for you.
